description: Bounded differential for Gust HTTP core SSOT: radix router, Method parse, W3C traceparent. Middleware security stack covered for W3C trace subset only.

domains.notes: Method enum parse/from_str/from_u8/as_str SSOT shared with WASM

limitations: Full HTTP buffer zero-copy parse lives in gust-wasm and is not in this corpus (method SSOT only)
CORS/auth/rate-limit/session middleware not yet in differential corpus
NAPI FFI round-trip out of scope for this slice
No capability promotion — promotion_hold until prod_audit_pass
